title: Inbounding - MEDZnMORE
description: Created a real-time data validation tool ensuring 99% accuracy and <0.5% errors
problem: MEDZnMORE needed a specialized tool to validate pharmaceutical inventory data with extremely high accuracy, as any errors could potentially affect patient safety.
whatIDid: Worked with pharmacists to understand critical data points, designed step-by-step validation workflows, and created error prevention mechanisms.
overview: Building a custom data validation system for medical supplies inventory.
goal: Ensure near-perfect accuracy in inbounding workflows across teams.

content.text: Introduced guardrails like validation checks, warnings, and confirmations to reduce human error in high-throughput data entry.

results: Data teams were able to consistently maintain high accuracy with improved confidence in the workflow.
